## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Sasha Simic's background and potential fit for a recruiting role at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sasha has 7-8 years of diverse recruiting experience, including agency, in-house, and technical roles](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [fwd.digital is exploring hiring options, potentially for both GTM and technical recruiting roles](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Sasha is open to flexible arrangements, including contract work or trial periods](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Bridget needs to finalize headcount plans and get leadership approval before moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

## Topics

### Sasha's Background and Experience

  - [Started in agency recruiting, then moved to in-house roles](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Worked at FreshBooks (400-500 employees) and Agency Analytics (scaled from 60 to 150 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Experience in both technical and go-to-market recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Contract work with Cohere AI, focusing on specialized roles](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### fwd.digital's Recruiting Needs

  - [Two potential focus areas: technical talent (AI/ML) and business hires](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Currently using a custom AI-powered recruiting process for initial screening](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Considering hiring separate recruiters for technical and GTM roles](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Headcount planning still in progress, affecting hiring decisions](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Recruiting Strategies and Tools

  - [Sasha emphasizes relationship-building and long-term candidate engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Experience with tools like Dover, Gem, and Zoom Info for sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Bridget mentioned Noon as an AI-powered sourcing tool (new to Sasha)](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Discussion of AI's role in recruiting processes and potential biases](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Compensation and Employment Structure

  - [GTM role potentially in the $80-120k range](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Technical recruiting role may have a higher budget](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [fwd.digital currently uses a contractor model for non-US employees](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Open to reimbursing for recruiting tools and expenses](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to discuss potential hiring options with co-founders in upcoming leadership meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Finalize headcount plans and budget for recruiting roles](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Explore possibility of starting Sasha on a short-term or trial basis](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Sasha to follow up if he doesn't hear back, understanding Bridget's current workload](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [Consider leveraging Sasha's experience with Cohere AI for potential AI/ML recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/ipqfB87auxn1yjCxWZrsZKnevWDd3GWF?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
